item.title: If you give a politician $5 to influence a vote, it’s bribery.If billionaires spend $50 million to influence an election, it’s legal.That is what a corrupt campaign finance system looks like.

I’d get too lonely so I’d have my boyfriend and my best friend and at least 6 cats
Bruce tax
Gertie tax
Froggy tax
Liza Jane and Scruffy tax
Nessie tax

item.title: I Bought a 32" Sony CRT Television in 2000 for Around 700 usd (1,350 Today)
item.dc:creator: McPuffinStuff

item.title: Sunday scaries? Not anymore!
item.description:
Welcome to this dump of random memes. Sometimes I make them themed, sometimes I don't. If you enjoy laughing without talking politics, getting away from the horrors of the world, or escaping reality, you’ll love following this page!
Yay for female friends to keep us sane
Would appreciate this, actually
I had forgotten what that meant. People forget that babies are born knowing nothing about this world, and that teens definitely don't know old references.
Can confirm
Ever heard court transcriptions? Hilarious
Yay!
I too, do not care for a large orange destroying my city. Luckily, I live in a boring state so nothing attacks my capital. We all know monsters only attack LA and NYC
OMG this is the dumbest thing I've ever seen
They both had lap pinkies
It's like they're inside my head
I liked the romance but I've never actually read the book. I only read the trilogy.
Oops, the internet got me again
Too perfect to add anything
Legend says he died waiting for the ice cream machine to be repaired
Tis but a scratch
They're just making their life more magical
Wow, learn something new every day
Only Dr Pepper
I would quit
Creating repeat business
Being a mom has been the same for decades
The kid is the gate opener
She's a nurturer
It's funny that all adults feel this way but expect more from other adults
Sounds good. I would like mine to be a temporary.
I would have to change this every day. My son's aim isn't great.
What a Herculean task
I didn't buy myself chips because I need to eat better. I hate myself. I want chips.
Yes yes, I'm hot mess
Umm, what?
Wow, hadn't thought about whether or not gods were gay
I feel weird. Like, I know this existed in my lifetime but I had forgotten about it. Unlocked a memory.
Knowing how to use a rotary phone. Barely made it to the earth in time to need this skill. My kids saw one in an antique store last week but didn't know what it was at all.
Yeah, I rarely use it for juice. Cat vomit though, nearly every day.
Just do everything exactly the way I want and I'm totally chill
Clark the Aardvark
I would've thought Oktoberfest would be a prime cheese holiday
Sounds like my kind of theme park
How dare it
That would be an awesome gift
I think it's amazing
Ice cream is essential for mental health
Nice security system
Genius
Oh look, different options. But if you had an orange cat, would you get an orange couch?
Sounds like a steal in this economy
Yes
Damn it, Barbie! You know I just had a rough day destroying the galaxy! All I want is a beer waiting for me. All you have is every job known up mankind. Would it be so hard for you to have hot food waiting for me? Geez.
She lives on Sesame Street. Can't she live with Big Bird?
item.dc:creator: GigglySprinkleCupcake

item.title: Leaving the good ‘ol US of A
item.description: While the sample size was just 1,000 people, [researchers] noted that the findings were a striking contrast to previous iterations of the same poll; from 2014 onwards, the number of women in the US who said they wanted to leave had soared fourfold. When it came to young men, however, the numbers had held steady at around 19%, giving rise to what [researchers] described as the widest recorded gender divide of any country polled. Source: https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2026/may/19/us-women-migrating-europe-politics
item.dc:creator: BigBlueWonder

item.title: Time magic is a blessing and a curse
item.description:
This is an edited (shortened and sped up with different music) version of this video by Eva Figueroa. https://www.instagram.com/_evafigueroa_/reel/DAYlCgPhKFU/ The original version is definitely worth checking. I would have included it here, but the length of the original video is too long to upload. Animator's Instagram page: https://www.instagram.com/_evafigueroa_/ Edit: For those wondering, the song in this version of the video is called "Young Girl A" by Shiina Mota.
Here's some character info from the artist for those interested in knowing more about them.
item.dc:creator: SquirrelWithATophat

item.title: I’m convinced she knows exactly how cute she is
item.dc:creator: alizasteve1

item.title: Mostly Cat Tax
item.description:
My Mr. Mustang Cat.
Fun fact: Marlon Brando absolutely KILLED it in The Godfather, but he did so without learning his lines. Whenever he's speaking there's someone out of frame with a card for him to read.
I took this picture. I think it's a very photogenic cluster of mushrooms. I am bored at the end of a night shift. Feel free to message me if you want to talk.
item.dc:creator: faxlite2

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1697 (one more thing)
item.description:
I heard the first Mexican Whip-poor-will that ive encountered in almost 20 years early this morning. Im going to take that as a good omen. Let's get this bread.
Pigeon Columbo. (The scientific name of the Rock Pigeon is Colombia livia)
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "What doing?" ____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Now I'm more than ever it is obvious that selective and distorted teachings keep people stupid and controllable

item.title: I believe that children are our future.
item.description: Daniel Mattingly's speech to his school calling them out for all their racist, sexist, homophobic norms. Support him at the gofundme. https://www.gofundme.com/f/support-daniel-mattingly-after-loss
item.dc:creator: countervail247365

item.title: Monday Phone Clearing MEME DUMP #851 (I need the space for... you know what...)
item.description:
1. Hey Imgur, where were you when you received that one compliment from a girl?
2. GINGERS! Listen up!
3
4. Cat confused by sorcery
5
6. What a convo wow
7
8. Unmute obviously
9
10
11
12. Bro, is this Obama's subway take? Also he should actually be on Subway takes!!!
13. Just a dad dadding
14. Hurry up and open the door idiot Yes, boss, I am boss
15. And finally just wanted to share something personal! A Streamer with 1 Million Followers Played My Demo! No idea how Nyanners found it, but she is so funny and I was just smiling watching all the way trough! As you know indie game dev can get lonely sometimes. We sit in a dark room with two monitors for most of the process and just silently work... so for the demo of The Milgram Experiment to come out and Nyanners to give it a chance is just... crazy. If you want to support my work, a wishlist on Steam would be greatly appreciated: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2719670/The_Milgram_Experiment P.S. Would YOU ever take life of an individual that caused you no harm?
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Tale as old as time
item.description: And that’s not even the whole story, a reminder that before the revolution, Cuba had a US backed dictator (Fulgencio Batista) who brutalized the people for decades with Americas blessing. The US has NEVER cared about freedom or democracy, it has only ever cared about money and the power to get more…
item.dc:creator: Mgxr44

item.title: CBS did issue takedowns.
item.description: https://variety.com/2026/tv/news/cbs-stephen-colbert-only-in-monroe-public-access-show-1236758093/ Reposted after finding more info. Apologies for the confusion on my last post. So yes, CBS/paramount did issue copyright takedowns on YouTube of the show. Here is their reasoning: “Stephen Colbert’s return to Monroe in the ‘Only in Monroe’ episode was financed and produced by CBS Studios and was posted on Stephen Colbert’s YouTube channel in collaboration with Monroe Community Media and ‘The Late Show’s’ YouTube channels,” a CBS spokesperson said in a statement. “As is our regular practice, we send copyright notices to unauthorized websites that post copyrighted content from CBS and our network/studio talent such as Stephen Colbert. However, for this episode, we have decided to waive further enforcement of this standard industry practice until additional review.”
item.dc:creator: WeatherWiz

item.title: First time nerves
item.description: Well this will be my first time doing burlesque professionally. My friend is the troup leader and I have been doing weekly dance practice and daily spotting and mock ups. Wish me luck. About 1-2% of the audience will be there for me

item.title: GovBrief Today #479
item.description: The president spent some of his Sunday posting AI mugshots of his political enemies. Trump's "Shady Bunch" put Obama, Comey, and six other opponents in orange prison jumpsuits, arranged in a Brady Bunch grid. "Sick group of people," he wrote. His Justice Department charged Comey last month with threatening to kill the president over a beach photo of seashells arranged to read "86 47." The day after, Trump told reporters that "86" is "a mob term for kill 'em" and posted the same theory on Truth Social. The cartoon names who Trump wants in prison. The indictment shows who he can already reach. The mockery on Truth Social and the prosecutions in court are the same campaign. Don't let anyone in your life call this satire. I've emailed 7,547 stories over 479 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Free Subscription - https://gbounacos.substack.com Don't miss today's quote of the day, images, and data: https://go.govbrief.today/260524-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may24 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/atlanta-ebola [3] https://go.govbrief.today/oc-fears [4] https://go.govbrief.today/bah-fees [5] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-ai-shady [6] https://go.govbrief.today/platner-nesn Free Subscription - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Carefully Curated Crap, Vol. 853
item.description:
1
2
3

5
6
7
8
9
10
11
12

15
16

20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Andre Kirmayr
"The higher up you go, the more mistakes you are allowed. Right at the top, if you make enough of them, it’s considered to be your style." -Fred Astaire So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.**
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator
